LMini.desc: LAMPRO's LMini LED panel features COB technology and HDR for a 10,000:1 contrast ratio. With EBL+ optical processing and a common cathode design, it delivers pure black visuals and superior energy efficiency.

LMini P.desc: Discover LMini P Series from Lampro: Your ideal Mini display for commercial success. We stand behind our products with excellent value and energy efficiency, as well as top-quality service and support. Learn more!

LHP.desc: LAMPRO's LHP series is a high-integration HD LED display with a wireless design and GOB technology for superior durability. With full front maintenance and a pioneering cooling system, it delivers stable, high-definition performance for museums, conferences, and command centers.

BNXII.desc: LAMPRO’s BNXII Series offers a versatile modular LED screen designed for free-form creativity. Featuring multiple panel sizes, wireless connections, and flexible splicing, this lightweight display enables unique shapes and dynamic installations.

LCF.desc: LAMPRO’s LCF Series curved LED screens feature a 72° three-dimensional fold and an ultra-thin, lightweight design—ideal for immersive projects and visually striking installations.

LC COB.desc: The LC-COB series redefines COB LED screens with its sleek, minimalist look and magnetic design. Powered by full flip-chip technology, it delivers exceptional protection, a crisp 3840Hz refresh rate, and an impressive 10,000:1 contrast ratio for vibrant, seamless visuals that captivate.
